machinery_genes.role: secreted hexameric inner-tube protein; Aux2-cluster copy
machinery_genes.quote: The V. cholerae T6SS substrates Hcp-1, VgrG-1, Hcp-2, and VgrG-2 are encoded outside of T6SS locus.
machinery_genes.note: Hcp-2 is the first gene of the Aux2 cluster (locus VCA0017 per Zheng 2011 Table 1, row 'VCA0017 (hcp-2)'). Hcp = TssD inner-tube machinery; counted as machinery per the T6SS brief, not as an effector.

machinery_genes.role: secreted trimeric tube-tip spike; Aux2-cluster copy
machinery_genes.quote: The V. cholerae T6SS substrates Hcp-1, VgrG-1, Hcp-2, and VgrG-2 are encoded outside of T6SS locus.
machinery_genes.note: vgrG-2 = VCA0018 (Zheng 2011 Table 1, row 'VCA0018 (vgrG-2)'), immediately downstream of hcp-2 in the Aux2 cluster and upstream of the effector VasX/VCA0020. Zheng 2011 report VgrG-2 is the VgrG individually essential for Hcp secretion and killing ('VgrG-2 is the only VgrG protein individually essential for secretion as well as killing'). VgrG = TssI spike machinery, counted as machinery per the brief.

machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: vipA = VCA0107 (Zheng 2011 Table 1). Shared core apparatus encoded in the main cluster (VCA0107-VCA0124) that powers firing of all three V. cholerae T6SS clusters including Aux2. VipA/VipB form the sheath that 'resembles contracted tail sheath of bacteriophage T4'.

machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: vipB = VCA0108 (Zheng 2011 Table 1). 'VipA binds to VipB and they together form tubules ... that ... resemble ... the contracted tail sheath of bacteriophage T4.' Shared core apparatus (main cluster).

machinery_genes.role: membrane-complex structural component (essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: VipA, VipB, VasF, ClpV and VasK have been shown to be essential for Hcp secretion in O37 serogroup strain V52 in previous reports
machinery_genes.note: vasF = VCA0115 (Zheng 2011 Table 1). Named structural component essential for Hcp secretion; assigned to the DotU/TssL-like membrane-complex family from the apparatus brief (VasF is the V. cholerae DotU-ortholog). Shared core apparatus (main cluster).

machinery_genes.role: AAA+ ATPase; recycles the contracted sheath
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: clpV = VCA0116 (Zheng 2011 Table 1). 'ClpV ATPase activity can remodel VipA/VipB tubules'; counted as machinery (TssH) per the brief. Shared core apparatus (main cluster).

machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: vasK = VCA0120 (Zheng 2011 Table 1); IcmF/TssM-family membrane component. Shared core apparatus (main cluster).

machinery_genes.role: structural apparatus component (essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: Named by locus tag as one of the twelve essential structural components; specific Tss-letter assignment not given in the paper. Baseplate/membrane-complex core gene of the main cluster shared by Aux2. Lower-confidence family call (no vip/vas gene name).

machinery_genes.role: structural apparatus component (essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: Named by locus tag among the twelve essential structural components; no individual vip/vas/Tss name assigned in the source. Main-cluster core, shared by Aux2.

machinery_genes.role: structural apparatus component (essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: Named by locus tag among the twelve essential structural components; no individual gene name assigned. Main-cluster core, shared by Aux2.

machinery_genes.role: structural apparatus component (essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: Named by locus tag among the twelve essential structural components; no individual gene name assigned. Main-cluster core, shared by Aux2.

machinery_genes.role: structural apparatus component (essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: Named by locus tag among the twelve essential structural components; no individual gene name assigned. Main-cluster core, shared by Aux2.

machinery_genes.role: structural apparatus component (essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: Named by locus tag among the twelve essential structural components; no individual gene name assigned. Main-cluster core, shared by Aux2.

machinery_genes.role: structural apparatus component (ImpA-rel-N / inner-membrane, essential for Hcp secretion)
machinery_genes.quote: twelve (VipA, VipB, VCA0109–VCA0115, ClpV, VCA0119, and VasK) are essential for Hcp secretion and bacterial virulence, and thus likely function as structural components of the apparatus
machinery_genes.note: Named by locus tag among the twelve essential structural components. Paper notes 'both VCA0119 and VCA0121 have ImpA-rel-N superfamily domains'; VCA0119 is essential for secretion (VCA0121 is not and is excluded). Main-cluster core, shared by Aux2.

machinery_genes.role: secreted VgrG spike protein (main-cluster, cooperates with VgrG-2)
machinery_genes.quote: despite the fact that inactivation of VgrG-1 or VgrG-3 alone does not affect bacterial killing, inactivation of both of these genes does block killing
machinery_genes.note: vgrG-3 = VCA0123 (Zheng 2011 Table 1). VgrG = TssI spike machinery (the VgrG-3 protein carries a C-terminal effector domain, but the VgrG body is apparatus; counted as machinery per the brief, which keeps VgrG in the answer key). Functionally redundant with VgrG-1 for killing. Included as a secreted spike; lower priority for the Aux2 instance since vgrG-2 is the Aux2-resident spike.

notes: V. cholerae T6SS is split across one main cluster (VCA0107-VCA0124 on chromosome 2 / NC_002506.1) and two auxiliary 'orphan' clusters: Aux1 (VC1415-VC1421, hcp-1/vgrG-1) and Aux2 (VCA0017-VCA0021, hcp-2/vgrG-2). This instance is Aux2; its curated effector VC_A0020 = VasX (Miyata 2011), encoded downstream of hcp-2 (VCA0017) and vgrG-2 (VCA0018). The Aux2 cluster itself encodes only the secreted tube/spike machinery (Hcp-2, VgrG-2) plus effector/immunity genes; the contractile-injection apparatus that fires it (sheath VipA/VipB, ATPase ClpV, membrane complex VasK/VasF, and baseplate/core genes VCA0109-0114, VCA0119) is encoded in the main cluster and shared by all three clusters. I therefore listed both the Aux2-resident secreted machinery (Hcp-2/VgrG-2) and the shared core apparatus, each with a verbatim naming quote. Apparatus paper strain note: the gene-by-gene functional characterization (Zheng/Ho/Mekalanos 2011, PLoS ONE) was performed in V. cholerae O37 serogroup strain V52, whose T6SS locus and locus-tag numbering (VCA01xx, VC14xx) are syntenic with the sequenced reference N16961; the brief's separated-paper/strain-transfer rule covers this. Locus-tag-to-gene-name mapping (vipA=VCA0107, vipB=VCA0108, vasF=VCA0115, clpV=VCA0116, vasK=VCA0120, vgrG-3=VCA0123, hcp-1=VC1415, hcp-2=VCA0017, vgrG-1=VC1416, vgrG-2=VCA0018) taken from Zheng 2011 Table 1. Deliberately EXCLUDED: VasH (VCA0117) and VCA0122, which the paper classifies as regulators not structural apparatus; VCA0118 and VCA0121 (the paper calls VCA0118 a putative effector and VCA0121 dispensable/unknown); and all delivered toxin effectors and immunity proteins (VasX/VCA0020 the curated effector for this instance, TseL, VgrG-3 C-terminal toxin domain, immunity protein VCA0021/0124). The Pukatzki 2006 and 2007 PNAS papers (founding T6SS identification and the VgrG phage-tail-spike translocation paper) are cited as apparatus support but their PMC full text was not retrievable via the API (abstract-only); the gene-level quotes all come from the Zheng 2011 full text and its Table 1 (verified via PMC). Lower-confidence calls: the seven locus-tag-only structural genes (VCA0109-0114, VCA0119) are firmly named as essential apparatus components by quote but lack individual Tss-letter/vip-vas names in the literature, so their precise sub-family (baseplate vs membrane complex) is left generic.
